SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-25-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-09-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 THE CASE IS CONTINUED PENDING DETERMINATION OF THE CONSTITUTUINALITY OF PROPOSITION (H) AS RAISED IN QUIGG VS CCSF, SF SUPERIOR COURT #316928. JOHANNA KEELY IS AMENDED TO JOANNA GENDELMAN.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,044.08 FILED BY TUCKER, NANCY M. MENEFEE, LYNNE AS TO DEFENDANT ALBERTSON, JASON GRAHAM, JEREMY GENDELMAN, JOHANNA MIXON, DESHEILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PLTF REQUEST TO CONT TRIAL SENT FOR SIGNATURE
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO MOVE COURT DATE BACK TO APRIL 23, 2001 DENIED BY JUDGE.
DEFT'S REQUEST(JEREMY)FOR AN ORDERED CONTINUANCE ON 11/19/01 AT 6:30 PM;PAID $10 CHECK;FOLDER FOR COMM'S SIG.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GENDELMAN, JOHANNA
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, JEREMY
PLAINTIFF REQUEST THAT TRIAL DATE BE MOVED BACK TO 4/23/01 1:30 PM, SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE. $10 FEE PAID.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUCKER, NANCY M. MENEFEE, LYNNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALBERTSON, JASON GRAHAM, JEREMY GENDELMAN, JOHANNA MIXON, DESHEILA $2,044.08 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,129.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
